positive: A whimsical, stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, designed as a continuous repeating pattern. The main subject is a stylized alpaca character perched atop the highest peak, looking out over the valley. Include various stylized desert flora, hot air balloons, and fantastical geometric patterns incorporated into the landscape design. The style should be minimalist pop art with clean lines, high contrast, and vibrant, warm color palettes (deep indigo, vibrant orange, mustard yellow, and teal accents). The composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for screen printing on fabric, emphasizing clean edges and distinct elements. Full coverage, seamless pattern style, graphic illustration, vectorial art look.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, disfigured, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
